message:
feat(redaction): add config + flags plumbing (bd-20xv1)

Add RedactionConfig for secrets/PII redaction control:

Config section [redaction]:
- mode: off|warn|redact|block (default: warn)
- allowlist: regex patterns to exclude from detection
- extra_patterns: additional patterns by category
- disabled_categories: categories to skip

CLI flags (global, inherited by all commands):
- --redact=MODE: override config mode per invocation
- --allow-secret: bypass block mode (use with caution)

Implementation:
- RedactionConfig struct in config.go
- DefaultRedactionConfig() with safe "warn" default
- ValidateRedactionConfig() for mode validation
- ToRedactionLibConfig() converts to redaction library types
- applyRedactionFlagOverrides() applies CLI overrides in PersistentPreRunE

Tests:
- TestDefaultRedactionConfig
- TestValidateRedactionConfig (all modes + invalid)
- TestRedactionConfig_ToRedactionLibConfig (conversion, patterns, categories)
- TestRedactionConfigInDefault

This unblocks 12 downstream issues for redaction integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
